final:
module RefModule(
    input [3:0] in,
    output reg [3:0] out
);integer obf_i;
    
    always @(*) begin
        out = 4'b0; // initialize output to all zeros
        
        for (obf_i = 0; obf_i < 4; obf_i = obf_i + 1) begin
            out[obf_i] = in[3-obf_i]; // iterate over input bits in reverse order
        end
    end
    
endmodule
